title: phlomoides knorringiana
intro: Phlomoides knorringiana, also known as the Sichuan phlomoides, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is native to the mountainous regions of Sichuan, China. The plant has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Phlomoides knorringiana include reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving respiratory function, and it is often prepared as a tea or extract for herbal remedies.
